title: aphanizo #0853
definition:
1) to snatch out of sight, to put out of view, to make unseen
 2) to cause to vanish away, to destroy, consume
 3) to deprive of lustre, render unsightly
    3a) to disfigure
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to snatch out of sight, to put out of view, to make unseen
 2) to cause to vanish away, to destroy, consume
 3) to deprive of lustre, render unsightly
    3a) to disfigure

    NASB:  to make unseen, i.e. destroy:
